holdings.infoBox: TXUE is an equity ETF with a total of 51 individual holdings. The top holdings are Thornburg Capital Management stock at 6.55%, Orange at 4.02%, BNP Paribas at 3.54%, NN Group at 3.34%, and Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group at 3.26%.

overview.description: The Thornburg International Equity ETF (TXUE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation by actively managing a narrow portfolio of non-US developed market securities of large-cap companies. The selection process combines bottom-up fundamental analysis and macroeconomic insights. TXUE was launched on Jan 22, 2025 and is issued by Thornburg.
